PAC / Alum / Ferric

Water Treatment • Coagulants & Flocculants

Water Treatment

PAC / Alum / Ferric

Coagulants and flocculants are used to destabilize colloids and improve solids separation in water and wastewater systems.

Download DatasheetRequest TDS / CoA / Quote
Applications
Wastewater clarification, suspended solids removal, process water conditioning
Typical Specifications
Stable liquor, consistent dosage efficiency, strong clarification performance
Grades / Forms
Liquid, powder
Technical Notes
Product choice depends on influent quality, pH, alkalinity, and clarification objective.
Documentation
CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
